Name: ID
Description: A guid that is the unique identifier of the item group

Name: GLCosts
Description: GL account on which the costs of items of this group will be booked

Name: GLCostsWorkInProgress
Description: GL account on which the work in progress project costs of items of this group will be booked

Name: GLCostsWorkInProgressCode
Description: Code of GLCosts Work In Progress

Name: GLCostsWorkInProgressDescription
Description: Description of GLCosts Work In Progress

Name: GLPurchaseAccount
Description: GL Purchase account for purchase invoicing according to (non-) perpetual inventory method

Name: GLPurchasePriceDifference
Description: GL account that will be used for the 'Standard cost price' valuation method to balance the difference between purchase price and cost price

Name: GLRevenue
Description: GL account on which the revenue for items of this group will be booked

Name: GLRevenueWorkInProgress
Description: GL account on which the work in progress project revenue of items of this group will be booked

Name: GLStock
Description: GL account on which stock entries will be booked for items of this group

Name: GLStockVariance
Description: GL stock variance account for perpetual inventory

Name: IsDefault
Description: Indicates if this is the default item group that will be assigned when a new item is created
